contents:
About Me AI Product Manager · Results-Driven · Practical
Master’s graduate with 8 months of hands-on AI product experience in the real estate vertical, specializing in LLM application layer product development. Proficient in no-code AI platform workflow design, agent decomposition, and multi-dimensional user profiling and memory systems.
Strengths Practical AI Product — Real business deployment experience with understanding of LLM pain points Advanced Architecture Vision — Complete progression from traditional workflows to modular Agent architectures Business Results Oriented — Quantifiable business conversion improvements Fast Learner — Quickly mastered the complete intelligent agent specification system
summary:

title: About

contents:
Overview Led the development of the AI agent’s underlying memory infrastructure, providing personalized memory capabilities for general-purpose agents through a 4-dimensional profiling system.
My Role AI Product Manager — Solution Design, Data Governance Rules, Standardization
Approach Profiling System: Designed four core profiling dimensions — Customer, Property, Owner, and Agent — establishing the data foundation for long-term agent memory Data Governance: Solved multi-system data conflicts with a 3-tier data cleaning rule system: data source weight priority, timestamp priority, and duplicate information ranking Standardization: Unified structured JSON field specifications for standardized, reusable multi-dimensional profile data Results Complete memory system from theoretical framework to implementation Standardized, reusable multi-dimensional profile data Powering personalized agent responses and precise user service
summary: Designed a 4-dimensional profiling system with data governance rules to power personalized agent memory
title: Agent Memory System & Multi-Dimensional Profiling

contents:
项目概述 核心负责 AI 智能体底层记忆底座搭建，为通用型 Agent 提供个性化记忆能力支撑。通过设计客户、房源、业主、经纪人四大核心画像体系，实现多源数据的标准化治理与智能体个性化应答。
我的角色 AI 产品经理 — 方案设计、数据治理规则定义、标准化输出
核心方案 画像体系搭建: 设计客户、房源、业主、经纪人四大核心画像体系，梳理各画像核心业务字段，搭建 Agent 长效记忆的数据基础 数据治理: 解决企业多系统多接口数据汇入导致的字段冗余、数据冲突问题，落地三重数据清洗规则——数据源权重优先级、数据时间戳优先级、信息重复度权重排序 标准化输出: 统一输出结构化 JSON 标准字段规范，实现多维度画像数据的标准化、可复用化 成果 完成记忆系统的全量理论梳理与方案落地 实现多维度画像数据的标准化、可复用化 为智能体个性化应答、精准用户服务提供数据支撑
summary: 设计四维画像体系与数据治理规则，为通用 Agent 提供个性化记忆能力支撑
title: Agent 记忆系统 & 多维度画像体系搭建

contents:
Overview Designed multiple business AI tools on a low-code AI platform while iterating on the existing intelligent customer service system to improve operational efficiency and conversion rates.
My Role AI Product Manager — Requirements Analysis, Solution Design, Iteration
Approach AI Tool Design: Identified pain points in real estate operations and independently designed AI Skills for listing copy generation, property highlight analysis, and batch processing Cost Optimization: Introduced code nodes to replace repetitive LLM calls, encapsulated reusable business interfaces Customer Service Iteration: Optimized prompt engineering and response logic for traditional rule-based customer service Results Positive improvement in customer service lead conversion rate Cross-scenario skill reuse with reduced model call costs Quantifiable business value delivery
summary: Built AI Skills on low-code platform and optimized customer service dialogue for improved lead conversion
title: Business AI Tools & Customer Service Iteration

contents:
Overview Led the core design work for the company’s new LLM-powered Agent customer service system, replacing the traditional DI-based customer service with a modular intelligent agent architecture.
My Role AI Product Manager — Full Solution Design, Intent Decomposition, Specification Definition
Approach Architecture Upgrade: Built modular agent architecture focused on improving user communication experience and lead conversion Intent Decomposition: Complete user query scenario analysis, defining response boundaries and tool-calling permissions for each intent Standardization: Established standardized Agent development specs with modular documentation system Results Complete 0-to-1 Agent customer service solution design Established standardized response system Replaced legacy rule-based customer service system
summary: Designed a new LLM-powered Agent customer service system from scratch to replace legacy DI workflows
title: Next-Gen AI Customer Service Agent Design

contents:
项目概述 基于低代码 AI 平台，为企业搭建多款业务 AI 工具，同时对存量智能客服进行迭代优化，以提升业务人效和客户转化率。
我的角色 AI 产品经理 — 需求拆解、方案设计、落地迭代
核心方案 AI 工具设计: 拆解房产业务真实痛点，独立设计房源文案生成、房源卖点解析、批量业务处理等多款 AI Skill，替代人工重复工作 成本优化: 针对大模型纯推理效率低、成本高的问题，引入代码节点替代重复大模型调用，自主拆解行业政策规则，编写业务计算逻辑，封装可复用业务接口 客服迭代: 优化传统规则式智能客服的提示词与应答逻辑，修复应答僵硬、场景适配差的问题 成果 客服留资转化率正向提升 多场景技能复用，降低模型调用损耗 完成可量化业务价值落地
summary: 基于低代码 AI 平台搭建多款 AI Skill，优化客服对话体系，实现留资转化正向提升
title: 业务 AI 工具搭建与客服迭代优化

contents:
个人简介 硕士应届生，具备 8 个月垂直行业 AI 产品落地经验，深耕大模型应用层产品搭建。熟练掌握低代码 AI 平台工作流设计、智能体从 0 到 1 拆解、多维度用户画像与记忆系统梳理。
区别于纯提示词优化的入门产品，具备业务拆解 → 规则建模 → 工具封装 → 数据治理 → 落地迭代的完整 AI 应用思维。擅长将复杂业务规则转化为可落地的 AI 能力，曾通过客服 AI 迭代实现业务留资转化正向提升。
专业技能 AI 产品能力 Dify 工作流编排 · Skill 技能设计 · Agent 智能体模块化设计 · 意图域梳理 · 对话话术体系搭建 · 大模型应用落地迭代
数据产品能力 多源异构数据治理 · 用户/房源/业主/经纪人四维画像梳理 · 数据冲突权重规则拆解 · 标准化 JSON 字段输出
辅助能力 代码节点提效 · 接口封装复用 · 业务政策建模 · AI 产品问题复盘与迭代
个人优势 落地型 AI 产品 — 无纸上谈兵经验，所有能力均来自真实业务落地，懂大模型应用痛点、算力损耗、模型幻觉问题，擅长用工程化思维优化 AI 产品效果 架构认知超前 — 入职 7 个月即完成从传统 AI 工作流、单提示词迭代，到模块化 Agent、底层记忆数据底座的能力进阶 业务结果导向 — 具备可量化业务转化成果，既懂产品设计，也懂商业转化 成长速度快 — 快速掌握智能体全新规范体系，能够快速承接前沿 AI 产品项目
summary:

title: 关于我

contents:
项目概述 承接公司传统 DI 客服智能化替换项目，负责全新大模型 Agent 客服体系的从 0 到 1 核心设计工作。
我的角色 AI 产品经理 — 全案方案设计、意图拆解、规范定义
核心方案 架构升级: 区别于传统固定工作流，搭建模块化智能体架构，以提升用户沟通体验、提高客户留资转化为核心目标 意图域拆解: 完成全量用户 Query 场景拆解，枚举业务全场景意图域，划分不同意图的应答边界、工具调用权限，规避智能体乱应答、越权应答问题 规范体系: 遵循标准化 Agent 开发规范，拆分模块化文档体系，独立完成角色职责文档、工具调用规范文档的内容梳理与落地定义 成果 完成 Agent 客服从 0 到 1 的完整方案设计 建立规范化的话术应答体系 替代老旧规则化客服系统
summary: 从 0 到 1 设计大模型 Agent 客服体系，替代传统 DI 工作流
title: 新一代 AI 客服 Agent 方案设计
